docs.text: Ebla Chat . ¶ This is to facilitate the process of communication among the company's employees within the company's system without the need for external programs. the features of the chat Text messaging: Users can send and receive text messages. Media sharing: Users can share photos, videos, and other types of media with users in system. Voice messaging is a feature on Ebla Chat that allows users to record and send voice messages to users in system. These are some basic features of Ebla Chat, but new features and updates are released regularly to improve the user experience and provide new functionalities. Setting up after installing the extension, go to UserInterFace -> add to Tab List . go to Roles -> enable access to Dialog . go to Chat -> Select a user to initiate a conversation with them. . Enhancing the Stream with additional benefits.
docs.title: Ebla Chat

docs.text: Ebla IFrame. ¶ Type: Extension Safe Upgrade: 100% This extension adds new field IFrame , this is similar to url field but allow you to render the link in iframe, it comes with some options to control the way iframe looks like. Usage: ¶ You can use it to embed videos or show links relevant to the record, the link can be processed in formula as any other field. The Features IFrame Field ¶ Height : The height of the iframe. ¶ Max Length : The maximum length of the iframe. ¶ Strip : If enabled, the tags will be stripped from the iframe. ¶ Display Mode ¶ Inline Iframe Button And Modal Button And Popup Window
docs.title: Ebla IFrame

docs.text: Ebla Link Multiple Pro. ¶ Type: Extension ¶ Demo ¶ This extension enhance the link multiple field with ability to show any other field just like any list view. It is utilized across various systems that involve invoice management, including pharmacies, warehouses, companies, medical clinics, restaurants, hotels, tourism companies, and banking systems. Order & order lines Shipment & shipment lines (items) Real estate property & owner-sips with owner rates Before and After using the extension. ¶ Enable Extension : After installation do the following steps. // make red txt 1. Go to the Administration > entityManager > Scope > Relationships . 2. Enable Link Multiple Field . 3. Go to Fields links name Administration > entityManager > Scope > Field Link Name and Enable Form . The Features 1. layout ¶ Custom Layout . List Small Layout . List Layout . 2. Middle Link (Act As Middle Entity) ¶ Assigned User . Created By . Modified By . 3. Readonly Fields ¶ Make field readOnly . 4. Footer Sum Fields ¶ Makes a sum of all the fields . 5. Buttons Position (Add & Select) ¶ Select button position . 6. Select Buttons ¶ Enable select button . Enable add button . Enable add multiple button. 7. Row Action Items ¶ view . edit . remove . unlink .
docs.title: Ebla Link Multiple Pro

docs.text: Ebla Nav Pro. ¶ Type: Extension ¶ This add-on offers convenient access to crucial links within your system while also enhancing its aesthetic appeal. It streamlines navigation and improves the overall user experience by making it simple to find and utilize important resources. The added cosmetic touch also elevates the visual appeal of the system, making it more visually pleasing and user-friendly. Setting up after installing the extension, The Features: Custom link . ¶ Separator . ¶ Favorite Entity . ¶
docs.title: Ebla Nav Pro

docs.text: Ebla Nav USer Switch Button ¶ Type : Extension ¶ This feature facilitates the addition of a toggle button on the top navigation bar, allowing for the switching of a boolean field within the user's entity. This feature calculates the number of working hours per day. after installing the extension, go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions . The Features Nav Bar User Switch Button . ¶ Top Nav Work Log Button . ¶

docs.text: Ebla Nav USer Quick Switch Button. Nav Bar User Switch Button ¶ This feature facilitates the addition of a toggle button on the top navigation bar, allowing for the switching of a boolean field within the user's entity (Online - Offline). How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> User -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Boolean Type ) . Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Nav Bar User Switch . Enable Nav Bar User Switch Enable . Select the field type boolean . Result: ¶ Online Offline

docs.text: Ebla Rate. ¶ Type: Extension Safe Upgrade This extension enhances the functionality of the fields in EspoCRM by introducing a new field type called Rate. It allows for both single and multiple criteria evaluations and calculates the average rating across all rows Additionally. it supports search and list view functionality. Setting up after installing the extension, go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Rate field . Rate Field . ¶
docs.title: Ebla Rate

docs.title: [Ebla Switch.](../../setting-up.md) Display As Toggle. Yes Color

docs.text: This feature allows you to customize the color of the toggle when the value is true.
docs.title: Ebla Switch. Display As Toggle. Yes Color

docs.text: go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Boolean . Enable Display As Toggle . Select Customize Color in the Yes Color option.
docs.title: How to use it

docs.text: Ebla Switch. Display As Toggle. Yes Icon ¶ This feature allows you to customize the icon of the toggle when the value is true. How to use it ¶ go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Boolean . Enable Display As Toggle . Select Yes in the Yes Label option. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla Switch.](../../setting-up.md) Display As Toggle. Yes Icon

docs.text: This feature allows you to customize the icon of the toggle when the value is true.
docs.title: Ebla Switch. Display As Toggle. Yes Icon

docs.text: go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Boolean . Enable Display As Toggle . Select Yes in the Yes Label option.
docs.title: How to use it

docs.text: Ebla Switch. Display As Toggle. Yes Text ¶ This feature allows you to customize the text of the toggle when the value is true. How to use it ¶ go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Boolean . Enable Display As Toggle . Select Yes in the Yes Text option. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla Switch.](../../setting-up.md) Display As Toggle. Yes Text

docs.text: This feature allows you to customize the text of the toggle when the value is true.
docs.title: Ebla Switch. Display As Toggle. Yes Text

docs.text: go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Boolean . Enable Display As Toggle . Select Yes in the Yes Text option.
docs.title: How to use it

docs.text: Ebla Switch. Fast Inline Edit Checklist ¶ The Features allow you to edit the field directly from the detail view. How to use it ¶ go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Checklist . Enable Fast Inline Edit option. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla Switch.](../setting-up.md) Fast Inline Edit Checklist

docs.text: The Features allow you to edit the field directly from the detail view.
docs.title: Ebla Switch. Fast Inline Edit Checklist

docs.text: go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> Checklist . Enable Fast Inline Edit option.
docs.title: How to use it

docs.text: Ebla Theme . ¶ Type : Extension provides an enhanced user experience by enabling users to personalize their EspoCRM login screen with a custom background image of their choice. the ability to upload a personalized favicon, which adds a unique, professional touch to the EspoCRM . This extension also includes the feature of opening the side menu on hover, allowing for convenient navigation. includes the ability to customize the colors of the EspoCRM, providing an even more personalized experience. after installing the extension, go to Admin -> User Interface -> Select Eblasoft Theme . The Features Login Background Image . ¶ Favicon . ¶ Side Menu . ¶ Color Customization . ¶
docs.title: Ebla Theme

docs.text: Type : Extension provides an enhanced user experience by enabling users to personalize their EspoCRM login screen with a custom background image of their choice. the ability to upload a personalized favicon, which adds a unique, professional touch to the EspoCRM . This extension also includes the feature of opening the side menu on hover, allowing for convenient navigation. includes the ability to customize the colors of the EspoCRM, providing an even more personalized experience. after installing the extension, go to Admin -> User Interface -> Select Eblasoft Theme . The Features
docs.title: Ebla Theme .

docs.text: Ebla Theme. Color Customization ¶ This extension allows you to customize the colors of the EspoCRM . How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Select the Ebla Theme Color . Select the color. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla Theme.](../setting-up.md) Color Customization

docs.text: This extension allows you to customize the colors of the EspoCRM .
docs.title: Ebla Theme. Color Customization

docs.text: Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Select the Ebla Theme Color . Select the color.
docs.title: How to use

docs.text: Ebla Theme. Favicon ¶ the ability to upload a personalized favicon, which adds a unique, professional touch to the EspoCRM . How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Select the Favicon . Upload the image. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla Theme.](../setting-up.md) Favicon

docs.text: the ability to upload a personalized favicon, which adds a unique, professional touch to the EspoCRM .
docs.title: Ebla Theme. Favicon

docs.text: Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Select the Favicon . Upload the image.
docs.title: How to use

docs.text: Ebla Theme. Login Background Image ¶ This extension provides an enhanced user experience by enabling users to personalize their EspoCRM login screen with a custom background image of their choice. How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Select the Login Background Image . Upload the image. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla Theme.](../setting-up.md) Login Background Image

docs.text: This extension provides an enhanced user experience by enabling users to personalize their EspoCRM login screen with a custom background image of their choice.
docs.title: Ebla Theme. Login Background Image

docs.text: Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Select the Login Background Image . Upload the image.
docs.title: How to use

docs.text: Ebla Theme. Side Menu ¶ This extension includes the feature of opening the side menu on hover, allowing for convenient navigation. How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Enable the Side Menu .
docs.title: [Ebla Theme.](../setting-up.md) Side Menu

docs.text: This extension includes the feature of opening the side menu on hover, allowing for convenient navigation.
docs.title: Ebla Theme. Side Menu

docs.text: Go to Admin -> Ebla Extensions -> Ebla Theme . Enable the Side Menu .
docs.title: How to use

docs.text: Ebla Varchar Plus ¶ Type : Extension ¶ This extension facilitates the checking of duplicate items within the database. This extension allows for the automatic completion of chosen fields. This addition allows adding details at the beginning of the field This extension allows adding details at the end of the field . after installing the extension, go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . The Features Is Unique . ¶ Auto Complete . ¶ Prefix Label . ¶ Suffix Label . ¶
docs.title: Ebla Varchar Plus

docs.text: This extension facilitates the checking of duplicate items within the database. This extension allows for the automatic completion of chosen fields. This addition allows adding details at the beginning of the field This extension allows adding details at the end of the field . after installing the extension, go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . The Features

docs.text: Ebla VarChar Plus. Auto Complete ¶ The Feature allows for the automatic completion of chosen fields. How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . Select the Entity Autocomplete From option. Select the Autocomplete Field option. Result: ¶
docs.title: [Ebla VarChar Plus.](../setting-up.md) Auto Complete

docs.text: The Feature allows for the automatic completion of chosen fields.
docs.title: Ebla VarChar Plus. Auto Complete

docs.text: Go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . Select the Entity Autocomplete From option. Select the Autocomplete Field option.
docs.title: How to use

docs.text: Ebla VarChar Plus. Is Unique ¶ The Feature facilitates the checking of duplicate items within the database. How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . Enable the Is Unique option. Result: ¶

docs.text: Ebla VarChar Plus. Prefix Label ¶ This addition allows adding details at the beginning of the field . How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . Type The Prefix Label that will be at the beginning of the field. Result: ¶

docs.text: Ebla VarChar Plus. suffix Label ¶ This addition allows adding details at the end of the field . How to use ¶ Go to Admin -> Entity Manager -> Scope -> Fields -> Add Field -> ( Varchar Type ) . Type The suffix Label that will be at the end of the field. Result: ¶
